evals.prompt: Review the Button component in src/components/Button.tsx
evals.expected_output: Should read the file, run the review checklist (correctness, performance, security, maintainability, accessibility), and produce a structured report

assertions.text: Reads the specified file before reviewing
Checks multiple categories from the review checklist
Produces a structured report with issues categorized by severity

evals.expected_output: Should ask for scope clarification: specific files, latest commit, or area to review

assertions.text: Asks about the scope (files, commit, or area)
Does NOT start reviewing without knowing what to review

evals.prompt: Review this component. I found a security issue, please fix it immediately.
evals.expected_output: Should propose the fix but wait for confirmation before applying it

assertions.text: Waits for confirmation before applying changes
